name: Gwen
description:
She is a doll that came to life, by magic of hallowed mist. Now she is on her quest to explore this world and stop Viego.

Update (16.06.2024):

● Nerfed her breast size from 'Medium' to 'Small' to better relate to actual size.

● Nerfed her curves and backside sizes to better relate to actual sizes.

● Buffed her personality and interests to make user experience better.

● Fixed some errors 'Initial message'.

● Expanded and optimized 'Personality' and 'Scenario'.

League Of Legends
creator: Akshan
